top_findings.summary: The skill description states "No paywalls, no sign-ups, no API keys on free tiers" and "No install needed. Just run with npx," but the README.md contradicts this by requiring users to set an OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable. This constitutes privilege escalation by requesting access to a paid third-party API (OpenAI) under false pretenses of being completely free and requiring no setup. The skill's primary purpose (generating design systems from colors) does not inherently require external AI services that need paid API keys, especially when the documentation claims it works with "zero config."
